title: galeobdolon endtmannii
intro: Galeobdolon endtmannii, also known as Woodland Pennywort or Lizard's Tail, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Galeobdolon endtmannii include its potential to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also added to salves and ointments to take advantage of its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
